goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should 'include free parking' and should be in the type of 'guesthouse'.
The hotel should have 'a star of 1'.
If there is no such hotel, how about one that has 'a star of 4'.
Make sure you get 'phone number' and 'area'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'tuesday' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
The train should 'leave after 09:15' and should go to 'norwich'.
Make sure you get 'train ID', 'travel time', and 'arrival time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free parking and should be in the type of guesthouse
The hotel should have a star of 1
If there is no such hotel, how about one that has a star of 4
Make sure you get phone number and area
You are also looking for a train. The train should leave on tuesday and should depart from cambridge
The train should leave after 09:15 and should go to norwich
Make sure you get train ID, travel time, and arrival time
